items.name: 国神城館
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 国神城跡の中心部の丘陵部分約300平方メートルを史跡として指定

en.description_en: A historic site consisting of the Kunikami castle manor. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1973-04-01.

items.name: 下荒具古墳群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 泉川沿岸の小高い丘に小円墳2基が並ぶ古墳時代終末期（7世紀〜8世紀）の古墳群

en.description_en: A historic site consisting of the Shimoaragu group of ancient burial mounds (kofun). Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1974-06-07.

items.name: 三城目獅子舞・平鍬踊り
items.description: 三城目地区に伝わる伝統芸能。鎌倉権五郎景政父子をまつった御霊神社と景政寺に奉納される

en.name_en: Sanjome Lion Dance and Hiraguwa Dance
en.description_en: An intangible cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Sanjome lion dance and hiraguwa dance. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1975-04-15.

items.name: 谷中古墳群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 阿武隈川流域に位置する前方後円墳。古墳時代後期（6世紀末）

en.description_en: A historic site consisting of the Yanaka group of ancient burial mounds (kofun). Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1976-04-15.

items.name: 五本松の松並木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: かつての奥州道中における松並木。白河藩主松平定信の時代に領内街道に植えられた

en.description_en: A natural monument consisting of the pine tree avenue of Gohonmatsu. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1977-09-07.

items.name: 原宿の熊野講
items.description: 豊作祈願と熊野信仰に結びついた伝統的な民間行事（もちつき歌）

en.description_en: An intangible cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Kumano devotional association (kumanoko) of Harajuku. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1981-05-01. Located at Nakahata.

items.name: 滝八幡三十三観音磨崖仏群
items.description: 隈戸川沿いの10メートル余の断崖に江戸時代後期に彫刻された37体の磨崖仏

en.name_en: Takihachiman Thirty-Three Kannon Cliff-Carved Buddha Group
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture) consisting of the Takihachiman group of thirty-three Kannon cliff-carved buddhas (magaibutsu). Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1981-05-01.

items.name: 大和久の天道念仏踊り
items.description: 豊作と太陽の恵みを願う伝統的な民俗芸能。毎年6月14日と6月23日に日吉神社で演じられる

en.description_en: An intangible cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Tendo nenbutsu dance of Owaku. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 1981-05-01. Located at Owaku and Owauchi.

items.name: 明新供養塔
items.description: 弘長4年（1264）銘の石造供養塔婆。町内で3番目に古い紀年銘を持つ供養塔

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (archaeological material) consisting of the Meishin memorial tower (kuyoto). Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 2004-05-07.

items.name: 根宿天王祭太鼓
items.description: 旧暦6月14日に八幡神社で行われる約4時間の連続太鼓演奏

en.description_en: An intangible cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Tenno festival drum (taiko) of Nejuku. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 2004-05-07.

items.name: 寺内阿弥陀堂供養塔
items.description: 弘長元年（1261）銘の阿弥陀三尊石造供養塔。町内最古の紀年銘を持つ供養塔

en.name_en: Memorial Tower of Terauchi Amida Hall
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (archaeological material) consisting of the memorial tower (kuyoto) of the Terauchi Amida hall. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 2004-05-07.

items.name: 正福寺本堂 格子天井絵84枚
items.description: 昭和2年に岡崎竹堂（長三郎）が制作した内陣格子天井絵42枚（墨画・龍）と本堂格子天井絵42枚（彩色・花鳥画）

en.name_en: Eighty-Four Coffered Ceiling Paintings of Shofukuji Main Hall
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting) consisting of eighty-four coffered ceiling paintings in the main hall of Shofukuji Temple. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 2004-05-07.

items.name: 阿弥陀湯供養塔三基
items.description: 阿弥陀三尊来迎浮彫石造供養塔婆と種子「ア」胎蔵界大日如来石造供養塔婆からなる三基

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (archaeological material) consisting of three memorial towers (kuyoto) at Amidayu. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 2004-05-07. Located at Seki-no-ue.

items.name: 旧水戸街道常夜燈一基
items.description: 文化8年（1811年）に奥州街道中畑新田宿より水戸街道分岐点に建立された石造常夜燈

en.name_en: Stone Lantern of the Former Mito Highway
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (historical material) consisting of one everlasting stone lantern (joyato) of the former Mito Highway. Town-designated by Yabuki Town on 2013-02-15.
